title: Pseudo-state interpretation output (Phase 6.6)
description: Classifies each harvested pseudo-state diff (probe + :hover/:focus/:active capture) as either a 'role-transition' (the component swaps to a different harvested role token) or a 'transient-overlay' (filter/opacity/transform adjustment without a token swap). Filtering signal for which diffs to surface in the public design.md.

interpretation.description: role-transition: the variant swaps to a different harvested token (surface in design.md). transient-overlay: cosmetic shift only (skip from design.md surface, keep in raw harvest). no-op: the diff is harvest noise, drop entirely.

transitionsTo.description: Required iff interpretation == 'role-transition'. The token path the variant resolves to in the pseudo state.
